approachNotes: Outfits are whole-doll GLB swaps (three Quaternius women share an identical 31-bone rig — Woman in Dress, Woman Casual, Woman in Tank Top — so swapping the GLB swaps the outfit cleanly on a shared skeleton). Hair, makeup, and accessories are planned as procedural Three.js geometry/textures attached at bbox-derived sockets (TOP, FRONT, EARS), matching the Monster Forge precedent — separable CC0 hair / clothing meshes that fit a Quaternius-style female base do not exist on Poly Pizza / Sketchfab as of the June 2026 audit. The Quaternius Ultimate Modular Women Pack (Feb 2022, CC0) has true modular parts but is not individually hosted on Poly Pizza — Phase 1 will download the full Quaternius pack (~80-150MB est.) directly from quaternius.com if Nick approves.
license: CC0 1.0 Universal (Public Domain) for all GLBs in this manifest. See ATTRIBUTION.md.

honestyNotes.barbieCuteVerdict: NOT Barbie-cute / NOT Toca-Boca-cute. Quaternius faces are simple block-shapes with painted eyes — no eyelashes, blush, or makeup detail. Bodies are chunky-stylized low-poly. Reads more like a kid-friendly Roblox/Sims character than a fashion doll.

recommendedPaidPackForBarbieCuteness.name: Synty POLYGON Modular Fantasy Hero Characters
recommendedPaidPackForBarbieCuteness.tradeoff: Cleaner modular swaps but still 'stylized' — not Toca-Boca. For true Toca-Boca cuteness, recommend Synty Sidekick Modular Characters at $199.99 (https://syntystore.com/collections/sidekick-character-packs) or commissioning custom art.

base.label: Doll - Dress
base.notes: Pink/rose dress. Shares 31-bone rig with woman_casual and woman_tank — true outfit-swap on shared skeleton.

base.label: Doll - Casual
base.notes: Hoodie + pants casual look. Shares rig with woman_dress / woman_tank.

base.label: Doll - Tank Top
base.notes: Tank top + shorts. Shares rig with woman_dress / woman_casual.

base.label: Doll - Animated (alt rig)
base.notes: Different release / different 41-bone rig. NOT compatible with the v1 rig group above. Useful as a richer-animation showcase but cannot swap outfits with the others. Keep or drop in Phase 1.

ifFreeApproved: Bulk-download Quaternius Ultimate Modular Women Pack from quaternius.com (10 chars x 4 modular parts, 24 anims) — adds ~80-150MB to public/ — Nick approval gated on bundle size impact.
Add 4-8 procedural hairstyles as Three.js BufferGeometry attached at HEAD socket (bun, ponytail, bob, long, pigtails, braids, afro, pixie).
Add 4-6 procedural accessories (glasses, hat, bow, earrings, necklace).
Makeup = Three.js material override on the face mesh (lipstick tint, blush vertex color overlay, eyeshadow texture).
ifPaidPackPurchased: Drop the Synty/other pack GLBs into public/assets/glam/{base,hair,clothing}/.
Migrate to the new pack's rig system (Synty uses a Mecanim Humanoid rig — well-supported by Three.js GLTFLoader).
Procedural makeup overlays still useful as a polish layer on top of pack textures.
